title: Average Length of Stay by Department

landmines.name: null-discharge-open-stay
landmines.kills: naive/1_open_stays_as_zero.sql -- COALESCE(discharge_ts, admit_ts) turns still-open (in-house) stays into 0-day stays and includes them, inflating the denominator and dragging the average down

landmines.name: calendar-date-vs-elapsed
landmines.kills: naive/2_calendar_date_diff.sql -- differencing the DATE parts counts calendar-day boundaries, so a 4-hour stay that crosses midnight scores 1 day instead of 0

notes: Length of stay is whole elapsed days = floor((discharge_ts - admit_ts) / 1 day). A same-day stay (< 24h) is a genuine 0-day stay and is included; a still-open stay (discharge_ts IS NULL) has no LOS yet and is excluded, not counted as zero. reference.sql is the SQLite form (julianday); reference.postgres.sql / reference.mysql.sql / reference.duckdb.sql give the per-engine elapsed-day form. mssql is omitted: its DATEDIFF(DAY,..) counts calendar boundaries (would need DATEDIFF(SECOND,..)/86400 plus a float-cast AVG) and was not verifiable in the authoring sandbox.
